hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *.dart) dart format "$f" ;; esac; } 2>/dev/null || true
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *.dart) OUT=$(flutter test 2>&1); CODE=$?; if [ $CODE -ne 0 ]; then printf '%s' "$OUT"; exit 2; fi ;; esac; }
